subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150311331 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
447753382/150311331 at 07:56:19.87 UT on the
11th of March 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a
solar flare."
